formattingRules.fontRecommendation: Conservative resume font with clear section hierarchy.
formattingRules.bulletStyle: Compact bullets emphasizing procedure, scope, and accuracy.

writingRules.bulletFormula: Action + accounting/audit object + procedure/tool + scope + accuracy, compliance, or reporting outcome
quantificationRules: Prefer concrete scope: sample size, stakeholder count, case volume, event size, model accuracy, project duration, budget, risk, or response time when supported by source facts.
When exact numbers are absent, use bounded evidence such as tool, method, deliverable, audience, or process scope; never invent metrics.
Use metrics differently by domain: technical performance for engineering, compliance/accuracy for audit, writing/research output for law and policy, service reliability for hospitality.

exampleBullets.strong: Reviewed invoice samples and reconciled supporting documents to flag reporting discrepancies for senior audit review.
exampleBullets.reason: Clarifies audit object, procedure, and stakeholder use without overstating ownership.

exampleBullets.strong: Prepared monthly variance analysis in Excel, summarizing revenue and expense drivers for management review.
exampleBullets.reason: Adds reporting object, tool, and decision context.

scoringCriteria.description: Conventional headings, readable layout, aligned dates, consistent spacing, and parser-friendly text.
Prominent sections and bullets match the target role and market context.
Bullets show action, method, scope, and outcome without unsupported claims.
Specific, concise, role-native language with no inflated AI phrasing.
Structure and density match the selected role, country, and CV/resume style.

promptSnippets.title: Accounting and Audit Resume routing rule
promptSnippets.content: When the target role matches Accounting / Audit / Assurance, use Accounting and Audit Resume as the primary industry route and adopt this formula: Action + accounting/audit object + procedure/tool + scope + accuracy, compliance, or reporting outcome.

promptSnippets.title: Accounting and Audit Resume language guardrail
promptSnippets.content: Preserve domain-native evidence for Accounting / Audit / Assurance; do not convert the profile into a generic tech, finance, or consulting resume unless the user target explicitly requires it.

sourceReferences.label: Local 123456 CV sample corpus
sourceReferences.note: 56 newly added CV/resume samples from docs/sample-resume-knowledge; abstracted into rules only, without copying resume text.

sourceReferences.label: Existing local resume-learning corpus
sourceReferences.note: Previously extracted school resume guides, templates, sample resumes, and industry profiles.
